name: US915 (902-928 MHz)
description: North America ISM band. ChirpStack commonly runs sub-band 2 (channels 8-15) for an 8-channel gateway.
notes: Sub-band 2: 125 kHz channels 903.9-905.3 MHz (channels 8-15) plus the 500 kHz channel 904.6 MHz (SF8BW500). RX2 923.3 MHz SF12BW500 (DR8). Gateways must match the ChirpStack region and sub-band exactly; mismatch is the most common silent join failure.
